prompt:
Scene:
A square fine-dining hero shot photographed from directly overhead on a deep black marble table with soft veining. A single matte white porcelain plate sits slightly off center with generous negative space around it, lit by a precise top light with a faint 45 degree fill from the upper left. The atmosphere is quiet, premium, and editorial, like a Michelin restaurant campaign image made for a luxury magazine spread.

Subject:
At the center of the plate, build a small architectural tasting course around a quenelle of chilled creme fraiche, a restrained mound of glossy black caviar, tiny cubes of translucent kohlrabi, a few gold-leaf accents, and delicate edible flower petals in pale violet and white. Add a thin ring of clear herb oil and several micro dots of dark reduction so the dish reads as intentional constellation-like plating rather than random garnish. The portion should feel expensive and precise, not abundant.

Important details:
Preserve true culinary realism: caviar beads must look separate and hydrated, creme fraiche should hold a soft spooned texture, porcelain should remain clean, and sauce dots must have crisp edges. Keep the garnish logic sparse and balanced, with every component readable at a glance. The visual language is minimalist French fine dining with immaculate spacing, premium ingredient knowledge, and commercial food-photography polish.

Use case:
Michelin Plate Hero Shot single study 1/8, focused on a luxury caviar plate with disciplined top-down composition.

Constraints:
No readable text, no watermark, no logos, preserve exact 1:1 aspect ratio, no cutlery, no hands, no table clutter, no oversized portions, no messy sauce smears, no impossible garnish placements, no extra plates.
title: Caviar Gold Constellation
description: A top-down Michelin-style caviar plate arranged with creme fraiche, herb oil, edible flowers, and gold leaf on white porcelain.

generation.runner_notes: Independent plated food hero shot with top-down luxury styling.

en.title: Caviar Gold Constellation
en.description: A top-down Michelin-style caviar plate arranged with creme fraiche, herb oil, edible flowers, and gold leaf on white porcelain.

zh-CN.title: 鱼子酱金箔星群
zh-CN.description: 俯拍的米其林风格鱼子酱餐盘,以酸奶油、香草油、食用花和金箔完成极简摆盘。

alt.en: An overhead white porcelain plate with caviar, creme fraiche, flower petals, and gold leaf on black marble.
alt.zh-CN: 一只白瓷盘置于黑色大理石上,盘中是鱼子酱、酸奶油、花瓣和金箔的极简摆盘。
